title: LR-94
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: Cry out with joy to God, all the earth. O sing to the glory of his name. O render him glorious praise, Alleluia.

title: Psalm 16
author: Owen Allstott
snippet: Lord, you will show us the path of life.

title: Luke 24:32
author: Joshua Blakesley
snippet: Lord Jesus, open the Scriptures to us; Make our hearts burn while you speak to us.

title: Center of My Life
author: Paul Inwood
snippet: O Lord, you are the center of my life: I will always praise you, I will always serve you, I will always keep you in my sight.

title: LR95
author: Let Us All Rejoice
snippet: The disciples recognized the Lord Jesus in the breaking of the bread, Alleluia.

title: In the Breaking of the Bread
author: Timothy R. Smith
snippet: In the breaking of the bread, we knew him, Lord Jesus. Alleluia! Alleluia!

title: Shelter Me, O God
author: Bob Hurd
snippet: Shelter me, O God, hide me in the shadow of your wings. You alone are my hope.

title: Come Home to our God
author: Suno xJim Ngo
snippet: The city wakes in shades of grey We find the ones who lost their way No one is left to walk alone We’ll be the light that leads them home

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lord, have mercy. Christ have mercy. Lord have mercy

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Glory to God! Glory to God in the highest, and on earth, peace to people of goodwill.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Holy, holy, holy Lord God of hosts. Heaven and earth are full of your glory. Hosanna in the highest. Blessed is he who comes in the moment of the Lord. Hosanna in the highest.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: When we eat this bread and drink this cup, we proclaim your death, O Lord, until you come again.

author: Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
Mass of St. Mary Magdalene - Sarah Hart
snippet: Lamb of God, You take away the sins of the world; have mercy, have mercy on us.
